items.name_en: 🎁Model: M46643 Monogram Vintage Saddle. 🥇Original Leather. This Micro Chantilly handbag is made of Monogram canvas, with a unique shape and small size that adds an elegant touch to any outfit. Inspired by the original Chantilly bag first introduced in 1978, it is exquisitely crafted and highly practical, with meticulous design that makes the bag even more refined. The bag comes with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, which can be worn on the shoulder or diagonally.

items.name_en: 🎉 New Prada nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody bag 😘😘 The hobo style that went viral among internet influencers is back with a new design! 👏👏 This Hobo bag has a great design 👍👍 Multi-functional 😘😘 Waist bag/Shoulder bag/Single strap 👍👍 Handles replaced with chains, adding a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, and comes with a long strap. The best part is the strap has a small charm (mini bag) that can also be used to hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes with any outfit 😘😘 Ladies, hurry up and get one, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Size: 22x12x6cm

items.name_en: 🎉【New】Model 837466 This new Gucci SoftBit shoulder bag reimagines the brand's classic accessory with an oversized half-horsebit silhouette. The casual shape features a magnetic closure and is crafted from richly textured soft grained leather, combining aesthetic appeal with practical function.
items.name_cn:
🎉【New】Model 837466 This new Gucci SoftBit shoulder bag reimagines the brand's classic accessory with an oversized half-horsebit silhouette. The casual shape features a magnetic closure and is crafted from richly textured soft grained leather, combining aesthetic appeal with practical function.
Deep green grained leather
Gold-tone hardware
Brown microfiber lining
Interior: Removable clutch
Strap: 20cm high
Dimensions: 46cm (W) x 26cm (H) x 16cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 1.4kg
Color: Burgundy full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
🎉Bonnie Oil Wax Leather🎉🎉
This Bonnie features imported oil wax leather with a glossy sheen that exudes a classical vibe. It comes with two detachable long/short shoulder straps for shoulder or crossbody wear. It offers a very large capacity and is incredibly practical👏. An essential piece for fashionistas, bring this retro-style crossbody bag home now!
Model: 1BC297
Size: 26x18x9cm
